improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon: a Claude-powered assistant built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly stating what Gideon is, who it serves, and the free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the price point builds trust and pre-qualifies visitors.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Partner"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice-powered support, and a dedicated workspace built for professionals. Try three searches free — no card required."
improvements.rationale: This headline introduces Gideon by name, immediately establishing brand identity while clearly communicating the AI-powered value proposition. The subheading reinforces three core benefits (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) and removes friction by emphasizing the free trial with no payment commitment upfront. This builds trust and encourages first engagement.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Memberships start from just US$2 per day, with annual plans saving you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock voice chat, an unlimited workspace, and Gideon's full professional capabilities—available whenever you need them.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model: what happens at the paywall. By clearly explaining the transition from free to paid, stating the accessible entry price, and reinforcing the value unlocked by membership, it reduces uncertainty and encourages conversion. It also pre-empts support queries.
